topic: My smart doorbell keeps recording someone standing in our hallway
title: My Smart Doorbell Keeps Recording Someone Standing in Our Hallway | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My smart doorbell keeps recording someone standing inside our hallway. The doorbell faces the front porch.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen showing a smart doorbell app notification with a still frame visible of an indoor hallway with a tall figure standing at the far end, the figure backlit and indistinct, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Installed last December. Faces our front yard. Outside only.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a black smart doorbell mounted beside a residential front door, the camera lens pointed outward toward the porch, soft afternoon light, the door and trim visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Two weeks ago I started getting motion alerts at three AM.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone on a bedside table at night, the screen lit with a smart doorbell motion alert, the digital clock visible nearby reading 3 02, dim bedroom ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I checked the clip. Camera angle was wrong. Shooting indoors.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen showing a paused doorbell video frame, the image showing a residential indoor hallway instead of the expected outdoor porch, ambient bedroom light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Down our hallway. Toward the kitchen.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a residential hallway viewed lengthwise from a low angle near the front door, the kitchen visible at the far end with a single overhead light on, no figures, ambient evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: A figure standing at the end. Not moving.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a residential hallway at night, a tall thin figure standing motionless at the far end backlit by a kitchen light, the figure indistinct and silhouetted, no detail on the face or body, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I checked the camera mount. Pointed outside as installed.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smart doorbell on the exterior of a front door at morning, the lens clearly aimed outward toward the porch, the surrounding mounting screws visible and undisturbed, soft morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Watched the recording again. Same hallway. Same figure.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen showing a paused doorbell video frame, the same indoor hallway scene with the same tall figure at the far end, the timestamp visible at the corner, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Three nights in a row. Three AM. Same figure. Slightly closer each time.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of three smartphone screen captures arranged in a row on a desk, each showing the same hallway with a figure progressively closer to the camera in each successive image, ambient lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I unmounted the doorbell. Put it in a drawer.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a kitchen drawer pulled open showing a smart doorbell device lying inside among other random items, the lens pointed upward, ambient kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a smartphone screen showing a new motion alert notification at three AM, the doorbell name visible in the alert, dim bedroom light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night the figure was outside the drawer looking down at the doorbell.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone showing a smart doorbell still frame, the image looking up from inside a partially open drawer at the underside of a tall figure standing over it, the figure indistinct from the angle, vertical 9:16 framing
